description: Colophon on the verso of a Qur'anic writing exercise, Cairo. Dating: 1872-1897 CE. The colophon identifies its young author as affiliated with Madrasa al-Qarabiyya, the one of the first government-funded primary schools in Egypt. (Information from Posegay)
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
